---
title: 'Latitude and longitude grid layer'
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/"
)
```

## Adding a latitude and longitude grid layer

### Basic example

```{r basic-lat-lng, results='asis'}
library(toro)
map() |>
  add_lat_lng_grid("red")
```


### Advanced example

For more info on controls see the [Controls Vignette](https://epi-interactive-ltd.github.io/toro/articles/controls.html)

```{r adv-lat-lng, results='asis'}
library(toro)
map() |>
  add_lat_lng_grid("red") |>
  add_visibility_toggle("lat_lng_grid")
```
